email_subject: Application for Customer Service Representative at Synergie
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at Synergie, as advertised on VDAB. With a strong foundation in communication, problem-solving, and customer-centric support, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client accounts, handle inquiries, and ensure timely delivery of projects. I am accustomed to multitasking in fast-paced environments and maintaining accurate records. My experience with order life cycle management comes from coordinating website builds and content updates, where I prioritize customer needs and communicate clearly throughout the process.

I am fluent in English, have a technical mindset, and am eager to learn. I am available to start immediately and can work onsite as required during training.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with this role.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at Synergie. With a background in digital marketing and web development, I have developed strong communication, problem-solving, and organizational skills that I believe will make me a valuable asset to your customer support team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client accounts, handle inquiries, and ensure projects are delivered on time. I am responsible for the full cycle of website builds and content updates, from initial setup to final delivery, always maintaining clear communication with clients. This experience has taught me the importance of being a single point of contact, taking ownership of requests, and resolving issues through thorough research and attention to detail.

I am fluent in English (written and verbal) and comfortable using various databases and systems to track interactions and maintain accurate records. I thrive in fast-paced environments and am quick to learn new tools and processes. During my time at Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume logistics setting, where accuracy and efficiency were key.

I am eager to bring my customer-centric approach and proactive mindset to Synergie. I am available to start immediately and can commit to the hybrid schedule, including full-time onsite during training.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proven ability to manage client accounts and act as single point of contact, ensuring timely delivery and clear communication throughout the order life cycle.
Strong English communication skills (written and verbal) used daily in professional client interactions.
Experience maintaining accurate records and tracking interactions in databases and analytics tools.
Demonstrated problem-solving and research skills through technical SEO audits and resolving complex client inquiries.
Comfortable multitasking in fast-paced environments, with a quick learning ability for new systems and processes.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service Representative
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with strong communication and customer service skills, experienced in managing client accounts, handling inquiries, and ensuring timely delivery. At Episto, I act as the primary contact for clients, coordinating the full cycle of website projects from setup to completion. I am fluent in English, detail-oriented, and comfortable multitasking in fast-paced environments. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and available to start immediately.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & account management: single point of contact, order life cycle management, client communication, inquiry resolution, record keeping
- Communication: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Data management & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads, database tracking
- Problem-solving & research: technical audits, issue resolution, attention to detail
- Tools & systems: WordPress, Elementor, Canva, Microsoft Office

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Act as primary contact for multiple client accounts, managing the full cycle of website projects from initial setup to final delivery
- Handle client inquiries and requests, ensuring clear communication and timely resolution
- Maintain accurate records of client interactions and project progress in internal systems
- Coordinate with cross-functional teams to fulfill orders and meet deadlines
- Track performance metrics and generate reports using analytics tools

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Ensured timely processing and shipment of orders

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application, collaborating with team members to meet project deadlines

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design & SEO (2025–present)
- Managed the full project lifecycle for a client website, from planning to launch, ensuring customer requirements were met
- Provided ongoing support and updates based on client feedback

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
